About Me

Dr. Elena Hartmann

Licensed psychologist, researcher, and educator passionate about making evidence-based psychology accessible to everyone.

With over 12 years of clinical experience and a PhD in Cognitive Psychology from Stockholm University, I bridge the gap between academic research and everyday mental wellness.

12+
Years of Practice

My Mission

To create a space where psychology leaves the clinical room and enters everyday life — where complex research becomes practical wisdom that genuinely helps people flourish.

What You Will Find Here

In-Depth Articles

Rigorously researched articles that translate clinical psychology into insights you can actually apply.

Brain Training Games

Science-backed memory exercises designed to strengthen recall and mental agility.

Curated Book List

Carefully selected psychology books I personally recommend.

Credentials & Experience

PhD, Cognitive Psychology
Stockholm University, 2012
Licensed Psychologist
Swedish Board of Health, #LP-8842
Certified CBT Practitioner
Beck Institute, 2014
Mindfulness-Based Cognitive Therapy
Oxford Mindfulness Centre, 2016
Author, "Rewiring the Mind"
Published 2019, 15,000+ copies
TEDx Speaker
"The Neuroscience of Compassion", 2021
MindScape

Evidence-based psychology insights to help you understand the mind, build resilience, and live more intentionally.
